---
title: "Blog"
description: "Essays on fieldwork, writing, and life outside work."
title-block-banner: "#844247"
author: ""
listing:
  - id: posts
    contents: "posts/**/**.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../_assets/blog/listing.ejs
    categories: true
page-layout: full
toc: false
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
code-tools: false
comments: false
engine: knitr
freeze: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="va-sec"><h2>Posts<span class="dot">.</span></h2></div>
```

::: {#posts}
:::
